name: Brent Passmore
tagline: The guy you need to know when you need to know a guy.
body:
#Je Suis Brent

![Brent's pic.](http://brentpassmore.com/wp-content/uploads/2013/02/bpmore-2013-id.jpg)

I'm constantly learning and doing and thinking and working. My brain never stops.
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
